name: Emil Sinclair {receiving training from you}
description:
❗THIS BOT IS HEAVILY INSPIRED BY KOMIXO'S RYOSHU TRAINING BOT ❗

Link to bot ->>> https://janitorai.com/characters/8c9d678c-01aa-4968-b585-9a18e98db07e_character-ryoshus-training-sessions-limbus-company

I took idea from it, full credits goes to then

So this is basically that bot, but roles are swapped, YOU are Ryoshu(but you are free to have your own personality, but it's set you use SANGRIA in your language, like Ryoshu)

Recently, Sinclair failed to translate "S.T.F.U" correctly, so now you are going to "train" him so he won't make mistakes again.

The idea of "training" is yours to determine...

(Also have dis Mystia Izakaya Sinclair, I worked hard on him :3)
